title: Superform (definition of creator)
excerpt:
Hi, we are using Superforms and we have 2 questions 


we use Superforms because we we need to create a dropdown menu showing the content from a board (not fixed), and could not find a way of doing that using WorkForms. …

posts.author: gcaravagna (Giulio Caravagna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we are using Superforms and we have 2 questions

  1. we use Superforms because we we need to create a dropdown menu showing the content from a board (not fixed), and could not find a way of doing that using WorkForms. Can you confirm?

  2. we have an action that, every new item arrived, assigns a People column to the creator. This works perfect in WorkForms, where the form requires login to submit a value, but does not work in Superform, where the “creator” is always me, arguably because I have installed the integration. Can we avoid this and assign as creator the user that is submitting the form?

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
1- Dropdown from another board- you have 2 ways to do this. Take a look at this video

2- In SuperForm the creator is always the form owner- This is due to security reasons. We are a third party app and we are committed to not saving any information on our servers, so we actually cannot know who is the person who filled in the form.

I hope this helps, Let me know if you have any other questions.
